    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    DatabaseManager
    Establishes a connection to a SQlite database using a provided file path.
    DatabaseSetup
    The DatabaseSetup class is responsible for initializing the database structure for the application.
    LegoApp
     
    LegoAppGUI
    LegoAppGUI class provides the graphical user interface for managing Lego Sets using JavaFX Users can connect to a database, add, update, remove and load Lego sets from a file.
    LegoDAO
    The LegoDAO class acts as the Data Access Object for interacting with the lego_sets table in the SQLite database Provides methods to crate, read, update and delete (CRUD) legoset records.
    LegoSet
    LegoSet Class This class represents a single Lego set and stores its details.
    LegoSetManager
    LegoSetManager Class This class manages a collection of LegoSet objects.
